reason: Defines the D1 baseline, status and audit constraints, canonical-tag alias rules, batch-write contract, and required database checks for the new published-event write path.
Defines authenticated admin API JSON envelopes, validation/status codes, and the no-redirect contract for the new POST route.
Defines admin layout density, Bits UI reuse, TagInput serialization, navigation behavior, accessibility, and frontend validation gates.
Maps the FormData -> parser -> D1 -> admin redirect contract and highlights boundary validation and round-trip checks.
Requires search-before-create and shared form/control extraction so the new page does not duplicate the existing admin editor.
